description: A precious yellow metal that doesn't tarnish; the sun's metal. 'Solai' names what never fades—the eternal gleam of incorruptible beauty.
sound_symbolism: The word glows solar. 'So' shines with warm radiance, sun captured. 'La' radiates outward in rays. Then 'i' rises to precious height.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo solai' (the gold). Associated with sun, permanence, value. Counterpart to 'shioli' (silver/moon).

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: Gold was sun-metal—incorruptible, eternal, the standard of lasting value across cultures.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: The precious within—gold as metaphor for buddha-nature, the incorruptible essence.
